SEARCH
Package qsim

Class Qsim

java.lang.Object
qsim.Qsim
public class Qsim extends Object
The main queue simulator class; simulates the behaviour of a battery of L lines

    static class

    This may be subclassed to provide necessary functionality

  • Field Details

    • L

      final int L

    • para

      final Parameters para

    • lanes

      public final Queue[] lanes

    • scale

      double scale
      How many seconds of simulated time per 1 sec of real wall clock time. The value of 0 means "infinity", i.e. run as fast as the hardware allow.

    • policy

      Policy policy
      Controls the choice of screener profiles for each lane.

    • display

      Qsim.ProgressDisplay display

    • version

      public static final String version
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • releaseDate

      public static final String releaseDate
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      static Random gen

    • odFmt

      static final DateFormat odFmt

  • Constructor Details

    • Qsim

      public Qsim(Parameters _para, long _now, StaticArrivalSchedule[] ss)
      Parameters:
      _para - Contains system parameters and simulation parameters
      _now - Sets the times (usually, to 0)

  • Method Details

    • getNow

      public long getNow()
      The local simulated time (sec)

    • showProfiles

      String showProfiles()

    • requestStop

      public void requestStop()
      Called from the GUI if the user clicks the STOP button

    • requestAttention

      public void requestAttention()
      Called from the GUI if the user has changed the system state somehow, e.g. by fixing a broken screening device; this means that we need to recheck at least that device's status

    • getLogData

      public Vector<long[]> getLogData()

    • saveLog

      public void saveLog(File f) throws IOException
      Saves the accummulated log information for this run.
      Parameters:
      f - File into which the data will be written
      Throws:
      IOException

    • setProgressDisplay

      public void setProgressDisplay(Qsim.ProgressDisplay d)

    • simulate

      public void simulate(long T)
      The main simulation loop.
      Parameters:
      T - stop if simulation time reaches T. Use a negative number to mean, "don't stop until running out of users".

    • describe

      void describe()

    • summaryText

      String summaryText()

    • usage

      static void usage()

    • usage

      static void usage(String m)

    • checkOutDir

      static void checkOutDir(File g)
      Tries to create out dir, if needed

    • main

      public static void main(String[] argv) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

    • numberOfLanesToHelp

      int numberOfLanesToHelp(int mypos, int direction)
      How many broken lanes does Lane mypos (which is assumed to be a working lane) need to help? (This depends on whether there is a capable "helper" on the other side). If there is an odd number of broken lanes between this lane and the next working lane, both working lanes will be helping the middle broken lane.
      Parameters:
      direction - +1 or -1

    • generateArrivalSchedule

      void generateArrivalSchedule(File f) throws IOException
      Generates and saves customer arrival schedule, for future use. This method first produces an arrival schedule for each list, and then merges them, arranging them in chronological order
      Throws:
      IOException
